question: The chart shows global smartphone market share by brand in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the percentage labels on the chart?

options.A: Apple has a larger market share than Huawei.
options.B: Samsung has the largest market share among all the brands shown.
options.C: Others accounts for more than 15% of the market.
options.D: Xiaomi has a higher market share than Samsung.

explanation: From the labels, Apple has the highest share (81%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Apple is largest when relying on visual comparison.
